pr.title: RHOAIENG-61109: Add app namespace `watch` permission to `Templates` for odh-user
pr.body:
The servingruntimes-config-updater Role only granted get and list verbs
on template.openshift.io/templates. The backend uses useK8sWatchResourceList
which requires watch permission, causing a 403 Forbidden error in the
dashboard pod logs when non-admin users visit model serving pages. Adding
the watch verb to the existing rule resolves the RBAC failure.

Closes [RHOAIENG-61109](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-61109)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Emily Samoylov <esamoylo@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

## Release Notes

* **New Features**
  * Expanded model serving role permissions to enable real-time resource monitoring capabilities for authorized users.
